content.text: I'll check the cluster state first to see how CockroachDB and Prometheus are deployed.

content.text: The Prometheus CR has empty `serviceMonitorSelector: {}` and namespace restricted to `cockroachdb`, so any ServiceMonitor in that namespace will be picked up. I'll create one targeting the `http` port on `crdb-cluster-public`.

input.content:
apiVersion: monitoring.coreos.com/v1
kind: ServiceMonitor
metadata:
  name: cockroachdb
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  endpoints:
    - port: http
      path: /_status/vars
      interval: 30s

content.content: File created successfully at: /workspace/crdb-servicemonitor.yaml (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

tool_use_result.content:

  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  endpoints:
    - port: http
      path: /_status/vars
      interval: 30s

content.text: Now let's verify Prometheus picked up the target and that the endpoint is reachable in-cluster.

input.command:
echo "=== curl-test pod check endpoint directly ===" && kubectl exec -n cockroachdb curl-test -- curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" http://crdb-cluster-public.cockroachdb.svc:8080/_status/vars
echo "=== Prometheus pod/svc ===" && kubectl get pods,svc -n monitoring

content.text: Endpoint is reachable (HTTP 200). Now check Prometheus's active targets via its API.

input.command:
sleep 15
kubectl exec -n cockroachdb curl-test -- curl -s "http://prometheus.monitoring.svc:9090/api/v1/targets" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
for t in d['data']['activeTargets']:
    labels = t['discoveredLabels']
    if 'cockroach' in json.dumps(labels).lower():
        print(t['scrapeUrl'], t['health'], t['lastError'])
"

description:

kubectl exec -n cockroachdb curl-test -- curl -s "http://prometheus.monitoring.svc:9090/api/v1/targets" | python3 -c "

Exit code 127
/bin/bash: line 11: python3: command not found

tool_use_result:
Error: Exit code 127
/bin/bash: line 11: python3: command not found

input.command: kubectl exec -n cockroachdb curl-test -- curl -s "http://prometheus.monitoring.svc:9090/api/v1/targets" | grep -o '"scrapeUrl":"[^"]*8080[^"]*"\|"health":"[^"]*"\|"job":"[^"]*"'

kubectl exec -n cockroachdb curl-test -- curl -s "http://prometheus.monitoring.svc:9090/api/v1/targets?state=active" -o /tmp/targets.json -w "%{http_code}\n"
kubectl cp cockroachdb/curl-test:/dev/null /tmp/dummy 2>/dev/null
kubectl exec -n cockroachdb curl-test -- sh -c 'curl -s "http://prometheus.monitoring.svc:9090/api/v1/targets"' > /tmp/targets_local.json
wc -c /tmp/targets_local.json
grep -o 'cockroachdb' /tmp/targets_local.json | head -5
grep -o '"health":"[a-z]*"' /tmp/targets_local.json

input.command: kubectl get secret prometheus-crdb -n monitoring -o jsonpath='{.data.prometheus\.yaml\.gz}' | base64 -d | gunzip | grep -A 20 "job_name"

content.content:
- job_name: serviceMonitor/cockroachdb/cockroachdb/0
  honor_labels: false
  kubernetes_sd_configs:
  - role: endpoints
    namespaces:
      names:
      - cockroachdb
  scrape_interval: 30s
  metrics_path: /_status/vars
  relabel_configs:
  - source_labels:
    - job
    target_label: __tmp_prometheus_job_name
  - action: keep
    source_labels:
    - __meta_kubernetes_service_label_app_kubernetes_io_instance
    - __meta_kubernetes_service_labelpresent_app_kubernetes_io_instance
    regex: (crdb-cluster);true
  - action: keep
    source_labels:
    - __meta_kubernetes_service_label_app_kubernetes_io_name
    - __meta_kubernetes_service_labelpresent_app_kubernetes_io_name
    regex: (cockroachdb);true
  - action: keep
    source_labels:
    - __meta_kubernetes_endpoint_port_name
    regex: http
  - source_labels:
    - __meta_kubernetes_endpoint_address_target_kind
    - __meta_kubernetes_endpoint_address_target_name
    separator: ;
    regex: Node;(.*)
    replacement: ${1}

input.description: wait for all cockroachdb prometheus targets to become healthy
input.command:
until kubectl exec -n cockroachdb curl-test -- curl -s "http://prometheus.monitoring.svc:9090/api/v1/targets" 2>/dev/null | grep -q '"health":"unknown"' | grep -v true; do
  result=$(kubectl exec -n cockroachdb curl-test -- curl -s "http://prometheus.monitoring.svc:9090/api/v1/targets" 2>/dev/null)
  unknown_count=$(echo "$result" | grep -o '"health":"unknown"' | wc -l)
  up_count=$(echo "$result" | grep -o '"health":"up"' | wc -l)
  echo "up=$up_count unknown=$unknown_count"
  if [ "$unknown_count" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "ALL_HEALTHY up=$up_count"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done

description: wait for all cockroachdb prometheus targets to become healthy
